ogTitle: Petrie Terrace vs Philpott: Climate Safety

heading: Petrie Terrace vs Philpott — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Petrie Terrace, Queensland and Philpott, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Petrie Terrace has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Philpott (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Petrie Terrace or Philpott safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Petrie Terrace has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Philpott scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Petrie Terrace scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Philpott scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Petrie Terrace or Philpott?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Petrie Terrace has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
